items.description: Vehicle fire on US 15 northbound between 4 miles SOUTH of Exit: PA 14 NORTH - TROUT RUN/CANTON and 2 miles SOUTH of Exit: PA 14 NORTH - TROUT RUN/CANTON. There is a lane restriction.
